design_philosophy: Clean, minimal, professional UI with authoritative high-contrast typography and vibrant yellow-green primary accents. Avoid default SaaS aesthetics. Use soft shadows, generous spacing, and crystal glassmorphism for floating elements. Mobile-first responsive with smooth hover animations.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary_foreground rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-primary_hover transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary_foreground rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-black transition-all duration-300

cards.base: bg-white border border-border rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
cards.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-surface_glass border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl

inputs.base: w-full rounded-xl border border-border bg-white px-4 py-3 text-text_main focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 outline-none transition-all

header.design: Sticky navigation header. Use crystal glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5`). Include a very thin top bar for email/phone with black background and white text. Main nav contains Logo, Links (Home, Courses, Training, Placement, Blog, Career Guidance, Contact) and a solid Enquire Now CTA.
header.behavior: Sticky on scroll with z-50. Nav links have primary color on hover.

hero.design: High impact storytelling. Left side: Massive text 'Build Your Future in Tech with Industry-Focused Courses'. Use the primary green for 'Tech' or highlight it. Right side: Floating bento-style arrangement of the hero_image and small stats cards (e.g. '100% Placement').
hero.elements: Primary CTA 'Explore Courses', Secondary CTA 'Download Syllabus' (outline style).

courses_grid.design: Grid layout for 10 courses. Use standard bento grid rules. Each card contains a lucide-react icon (size 32, primary color), course title (H4), short description, and an arrow link.

popular_courses.design: Horizontal scroll or 4-column grid of 8 cards. Each card must feature a badge for Level (e.g. 'Beginner', 'Advanced') and Duration (e.g. '6 Months'). Use soft shadows and hover lift.

why_choose_us.design: 5 features with icons. Minimalist, clean approach. Center-aligned section heading. Grid of 5 items, one large spanning two columns (Tetris bento mode). Icons should have a soft primary-color background circle (`bg-accent text-primary`).

student_projects.design: Gallery showcasing student work. Use the `projects` media URLs in a masonry or 3-col grid layout. On hover, show project title overlay (`bg-secondary/80 text-white`).

placement_success.design: Testimonials slider or grid using the `testimonials` media URLs. Use soft bordered cards. Include a bold quote, student name, and a mock company name (e.g., 'Placed at Microsoft').

enquiry_form.design: Cardless or soft-rounded card layout. Form on left, contact info/map on right. Use customized Shadcn Form components. Primary colored submit button.

footer.design: Dark footer (`bg-secondary text-white`) for maximum contrast ending. Contains address, contact, social links, and quick links. Large logo or 'NEXXTECHS' text watermark.

floating_action.design: Fixed WhatsApp/Call button at bottom-right. Circular, primary green background, white icon. Include a subtle pulse animation (`animate-pulse` or custom ping).

technical_rules.icons: Use lucide-react for all icons (Phone, Mail, MapPin, CheckCircle, Monitor, Code, etc).
technical_rules.animations: Framer motion for scroll reveals. Standard CSS transitions for hover states.
technical_rules.testing: All interactive elements (links, buttons, form inputs) must have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta'`).
